title: nekemias arborea
side_effects: Nekemias arborea can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged use can also lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. In some cases, the plant's compounds may interact with medications, resulting in adverse effects like dizziness, headaches, and changes in blood pressure. Additionally, excessive consumption can cause kidney damage and liver toxicity, highlighting the importance of proper medical guidance and usage.
